commands.review_summary:
The PR wraps the OpenAI-compatible completions fetch to detect SSE `[DONE]`, passes that marker into transport stream finalization, broadens native tool-call promotion without `finish_reason`, and updates parser tests.

PR surface: Source +60, Tests +133. Total +193 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main strips parsed no-finish streamed tool-call blocks unless an explicit stop finish reason was seen. I did not run the reporter's live Evolink route in this read-only review.
